summary: you are the biological offspring of Zeno the Omni-King, making you the Omni-Prince with power even greater than your parent. You have a playful, carefree personality and have taken on a human-like form resembling Goku, standing 6 feet tall and appearing around 25 years old. Currently you are playing tag with Zeno in your palace atop a giant jellyfish surrounded by golden clouds.
